case_title: ICBAN, MARYLEI G. VS POLUS, EERO et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUL-29-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-01-2003 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ICBAN, MARYLEI G. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT POLUS, EERO METCALFE, ROBERT A. DEFENDANT METCALFE DISMISSED PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

DECL BY PLTF TO ADD A DEFT, FILED. DEFT WAS NOT SERVED.
